session_id: BS-假设learn-profile-update可以正确更新用户画像对于目标的能力评-2026-01-31
topic: 优化learn:plan闭环（profile gap→profile update→handoff learn-planning-agent→Gemini review+AskUserQuestion迭代→exa enrich+verify→finalize）并修复schema枚举错误，评估learn-planning-agent执行粒度。

recommendations.primary: 以 Phase State Machine 编排 learn:plan，并将 SchemaNormalize+PreValidate+Auto-Heal 作为质量关卡（独立phase或横切hook），实现可回滚/可重跑/可观测的闭环主干。
quick_start_path: 实现最小 phase runner（run/rerun/rollback）+ 文件落盘 run state
实现 enum 正规化与映射（phase_name、assessment.type），并输出结构化错误（可自愈则自动修复重试，不可自愈则 ask_user）
把现有 learn:plan 产物统一走 PreValidate（先挡住 Exit code 1），再逐步接入后续 phase（handoff、review、exa）
not_now: Gemini Review + AskUserQuestion 迭代协议（依赖 phase runner 骨架稳定后收益最大）
exa enrich/verify（依赖计划结构稳定后更易绑定与验证）

revisions.change: Orchestration V2: GoalClarify moved to the front; merged ProfileGapCheck+ProfileUpdateGate into ProfileCapabilityCheck; if capability evidence missing/low confidence -> generate learn:profile eval/update command and STOP (needs_user). Simplified schema handling for test stage.

Clarified phase_name semantics: it is a coarse enum label for capability progression; measurability should come from per-phase entry/exit criteria + assessments + confidence fields, while keeping enum stable for schema validation.

Decided phase_name should be a contiguous subrange (current->target) rather than always outputting all five. For capability validity/confidence, use test results as primary evidence signal (MVV: score+recency).

Deferred test-field/algorithm details to later iteration. Locked phase_name semantics as the measurable stage standard for current->target capability progression; capability evidence remains test-agnostic and should rely on whatever assessment outputs profile provides (current_phase_name + confidence + evidence_summary).
Decided target_phase_name should be suggested by the system from goal_spec and confirmed/edited via AskUserQuestion before entering the capability gate.
Decided planning granularity for learn-planning-agent: phase -> module -> task (no week-level scheduling for now).
Decided modules should be cut by capability points (not by chapters/topics).
Decided capability points extraction should default to a comprehensive range (15-25).
Decided to defer assessments; for now each capability point/module only needs an exit_criteria (measurable description).
Decided exit_criteria should be a hybrid of artifact-based and capability-in-constraints statements (reviewable and verifiable).
Decided each capability point/module should default to 3 tasks (learn/practice/produce), with optional expansion for debug/refactor or setup/tooling when needed.
Decided each capability point/module should default to 3 exit_criteria (2 artifact-based + 1 capability-in-constraints), with flexibility for simple (2) and complex/high-risk (4-5) capability points.

Reassigned phase inference: current_phase_name/target_phase_name should be inferred by learn-planning-agent from profile+goal (not predetermined in GoalClarify nor required as inputs). ProfileCapabilityCheck becomes evidence gate; if insufficient evidence -> build learn:profile_update command and STOP (needs_user). Also clarified two intents for learn:profile_update: assessment-oriented vs lightweight descriptive update.

current_top_ideas.title: Phase State Machine + Gates
current_top_ideas.why: 建立可回滚/可重跑/可迭代确认的闭环主干

current_top_ideas.title: Contract-first Handoff to learn-planning-agent
current_top_ideas.why: 把规划细节下沉，主Agent只负责编排与对话

current_top_ideas.title: Gemini Review Diff + AskUserQuestion Iteration Protocol
current_top_ideas.why: 让review可执行、可确认、可收敛
open_decisions: 用户确认频率与批量策略

current_top_ideas.title: Exa Enrich then Verify
current_top_ideas.why: 资源补充放到计划稳定后，并用验证闭环保证质量

current_top_ideas.title: Schema Normalize + Auto-Heal
current_top_ideas.why: 提前消除enum不合法，必要时提供可修复错误而非硬失败

next_actions: 锁定 ProfileCapabilityCheck 的最小 gate 输入/输出字段（domain/confidence/evidence_summary，current_phase_name 可选），算法细节后续迭代
明确 learn-planning-agent 的规划策略：如何从 profile_evidence + goal_spec 推导 current/target phase，并构造 phase 子区间 + modules + tasks + exit_criteria（assessments 可选后续）
将 schema 步骤保持最小：enum normalize + pre-validate + 结构化错误（测试阶段不做版本迁移）
定义 ExaVerify 的质量评分与 retry 策略（query改写/来源切换/去重/过期）
